mapper.sql:
WITH GHG_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(BBB AAA CCC) */ BBB.dscfc_id, BBB.dscfc_nm, AS dscfc_lclhq_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_1001' AND cmmn_cd = ) AS dscfc_lclhq_nm, BBB.dscfc_bplc_cd, ( SELECT cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_1002' AND cmmn_cd = BBB.dscfc_bplc_cd ) AS dscfc_bplc_nm, BBB.dscfc_procs_ty_cd, ( SELECT B.cmmn_cd_nm FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd = 'GHG_0024' ) A, ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu2, cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1003' ) B WHERE A.cmmn_cd = B.usr_dfn_vu2 AND A.cmmn_cd = BBB.dscfc_procs_ty_cd ) AS dscfc_procs_ty_nm, BBB.dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd, AAA.dscfc_use_de, AAA.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, AAA.dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(AAA.dscfc_usgqty, 0) AS dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_gg01101 BBB, ( SELECT ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(MAX(ABC.dscfc_usgqty), 0) AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.dscfc_usgqty) END AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_use_de, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm, A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, A.dscfc_use_slip_no, A.dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_rq01103 A, GHG.tm_gg01104 B WHERE ( (A.dscfc_use_slip_no IS NOT NULL AND A.dscfc_use_slip_no NOT LIKE 'TMP%') OR A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd = '1' ) AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001')
AND ( A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(NVL(#{strtDt}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMM')), 0, 6) || '01' AND SUBSTR(NVL(#{strtDt}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMM')), 0, 6) || '31' OR A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '01' AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6) || '31' )
AND A.dscfc_use_de LIKE NVL(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy')) || '%'
AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id = B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id ) AA GROUP BY AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm ) ABC GROUP BY ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de ) AAA WHERE BBB.dscfc_id = AAA.dscfc_id(+) AND BBB.dscfc_use_yn = '1' AND BBB.dscfc_regist_stat_div_cd = '1' AND BBB.dscfc_use_fuel_div_cd = '61' /* 전기 */ AND BBB.dscfc_lclhq_cd != '88888888' /* 위탁 */ AND AAA.dscfc_use_de IS NOT NULL
AND = ( SELECT objid FROM (
) WHERE cmmn_cd = #{ecsBasinDivCd} )
)
mapper.select:
/* PRVYY_SAMM_VERSUS_CNSMP_STTUS_Dao_retrievePrvyySammVersusCnsmpSttusCndDeptList */
SELECT 'prvyySammVersusCnsmpSttusDept' AS cls_cd, '소비전력부서' AS cls_cd_nm, dscfc_bplc_cd AS cmmn_cd, MAX(dscfc_bplc_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, ( SELECT sort_ordr FROM SCM.tc_sc_unif_cmmn_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND sys_div_cd = 'SC' AND cls_cd LIKE 'GHG_1002' AND cmmn_cd = dscfc_bplc_cd ) AS sort_ordr FROM GHG_DATA_LIST WHERE dscfc_bplc_cd IS NOT NULL AND dscfc_bplc_nm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dscfc_bplc_cd ORDER BY sort_ordr
